g.text: BVP (64 Hz) · EDA (4 Hz) · Skin temp (1 Hz) · ACC (32 Hz)
Butterworth band-pass (0.5–4 Hz) · DWT db4 motion artefact removal · 4 Hz resample
Modality-weighted Z-score · PCA (k=8, 95% var.) · 18 handcrafted HRV/EDA/thermal features

svg.text: Stage IV — SWAT tier hybrid architecture

g.text: Concatenate + fuse — final hidden state h_T → Bayesian head
MC-Dropout (T=50 passes, p=0.20) · Shannon entropy H(Y|X)
H > 1.8 bits → uncertainty fail-safe (request re-read, no clinical alert)
Weights recall 2× over precision — missed clot worse than false alarm

svg.text: INT8 · 0.66 MB · 2.1 ms on ARM Cortex-M7
